chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-7102 of 2015 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For order on Misc. No.35306/15 (U/A) 2. For order on Misc. No.35307/15 (Exp/A) 3. For hearing of Main Case -------------------------------------- 12.11.2015. Mr. M. Ashraf Samoo, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Ashfaq Rafiq janjua, Standing Counsel along with Abdullah Hanjrah, Law officer of ECP. >><< 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. The main purpose of filing of this petition is that as per the learned counsel ROs and DROs are not performing their duties as per the Notification dated 10.8.2015 issued by the Election Commission of Pakistan. The Representative of the Election office waives notice and makes sure that ROs and DROs would act in accordance with law. Since purpose of filing of this petition has been served, therefore this petition is disposed off. JUDGE JUDGE Gulzar/PA
